name: No Crust Crab- Vegetable Quiche
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces fresh crab, frozen or canned (up to 8 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
MICROWAVE DIRECTIONS:
1. Combine zucchini and mushrooms in a glass bowl.
2. Microwave on HIGH for 2 1/2 to 3 minutes or until vegetables are tender-crisp. Stir in egg (or egg substitute), milk, salt, mustard, pepper, paprika, and crabmeat.
3. Microwave on HIGH for 3 1/2 to 4 minutes or until heated through, stirring twice.
4. Pour into an 8-inch round microwave-safe pie plate. Cover with plastic wrap.
5. Microwave for 3 to 3 1/2 minutes or until center is just about set.
6. Sprinkle with cheese and scallions. Cover.
7. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
CONVENTIONAL DIRECTIONS:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Saute zucchini and mushrooms in 1 tablespoon margarine until tender-crisp.
3. In a bowl, combine all ingredients.
4. Bake for 30 minutes or until set in center.
